impact: Wordmark Link could add focus-visible ring for keyboard users. Deferred as UI polish; deleted BasejumpLogo had no special conventions to preserve.
resolution: Accepted-for-poc: Basejump/Foundation review-bevinding, expliciet gemarkeerd als scope-tradeoff. Zie [[L-001]]. 2026-07-04 triage.
